theme_strategy.visual_style: Glassmorphism + Neon Accents + High Density Data

font_family.body: IBM Plex Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif

rules: Use Monospace font for ALL financial data (prices, P&L, percentages, trade logs).
Use Manrope for UI headers (Card titles, Section headers).
Use IBM Plex Sans for UI labels and descriptive text.
Tabular figures (tnum) are mandatory for changing numbers to prevent jitter.

layout.structure: Single-page dashboard with fixed sidebar (or collapsible) and tabbed main content area.

stock_card.style: Glassmorphism card with dynamic border color based on daily P&L.
stock_card.header: Ticker symbol (Left), Current Price (Right, large font).
stock_card.body: Mini-chart or trend line, Strategy status badges.
stock_card.interaction: Hover: Lift + Glow. Click: Expand details.

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-medium shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 transition-all

command_palette.style: Fixed centered modal, backdrop blur, search input auto-focus.

trade_log.row_style: Striped or hover-highlight. Success/Fail color coded lines.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Framer Motion layout animations for card expansion (layoutId).
visual_enhancers.loading_states: Skeleton loaders with shimmering gradient (slate-800 to slate-700).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-400 is readable on slate-900. Use text-slate-300 for critical labels.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable layout animations if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge, lucide-react, recharts (for simple sparklines/charts).
SETUP: Configure 'JetBrains Mono' font family in tailwind config.
CRITICAL: Dark Mode only. Hardcode 'dark' class on the HTML or body tag if needed, but allow toggling if requested (default to dark).
DATA: All price data must use 'toFixed(2)' or similar formatting. P&L must show '+' sign for positive values.
LAYOUT: Use a SidebarLayout component that persists across tabs.
STATE: Use Zustand for global state (prices, portfolio, logs).
PERFORMANCE: Wrap StockCards in memo() to prevent re-renders on unrelated global state changes.
ANIMATION: Use <AnimatePresence> for list items (adding/removing stocks).
universal_guidelines: Don't use gradients for text, it reduces readability in dashboards.
Use 'tracking-tight' for large number displays to make them look tighter/more numeric.
Inputs should have 'font-mono' for numerical values.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (Trade executed, Error, Connection lost).
